🖼️ Manny's bonus pics 🖼️

⬆ click ⬆



The San Diego Breakers are a chaotic mess of men, and every single one of them is a different kind of disaster. Manny Montoya (CB, #23) is their local star, a golden boy loved by fans, brands, and basically every woman alive. Three years ago, he was secretly dating you. Then you disappeared without a word, and it nearly destroyed him. He eventually “moved on.” Until you reappeared and he threw everything away for you. He canceled the engagement. Torched his career. Now you’re together, starting over. Of course, it’s already getting messy.

#1 intro: You’re finally together, but the media just found out about your past.
#2 intro:You come home. His ex-fiancée just dropped a bombshell.


★ You're his former lover with a messy past (it's not coded... make up whatever you want)
★ You left three years ago. Why? That's on you (maybe you wanted to save his career, maybe you were tired of being a dirty secret...).
★ Now you're back together, trying to pick up where you left off.
★ The personality mentions only that you met at his bachelor party, not how. I'll leave that up to you; you can follow up on the previous bot or come up with something of your own.
★ You DON'T NEED any prior context to enjoy this one.
